svg.title: ImagingStudy-open event flow
svg.desc: User selects exam on worklist, publishes imagingstudy-open; hub satellite dish broadcasts over WebSocket to Image Display, Reporting, and EHR; apps update together.

g.text: Step 1: User selects an exam from the worklist
Modality worklist row opens the radiology order
Step 2: Worklist publishes imagingstudy-open (HTTP POST, green)
Event context carries the ImagingStudy manifest
Step 3: Hub fans out over WebSocket (blue) to every subscriber
Image Display, Reporting, EHR on the same topic
Step 4: Each application updates its UI from the shared context
CT slice | draft report | patient chart
Ready to open study on topic
